title: Passport Access Class
description: A named access class for a Digital Product Passport. Defines who belongs to this class and which field paths they can read. Specializations can add policy overlays to these generic access classes.

className.description: Access class name, e.g. public, operator, auditor, partner

description.description: Human-readable description of who belongs to this class

readablePaths.description: Field paths readable by this class. Supports * (single element) and ** (recursive wildcard).

condition.description: Optional condition that must be satisfied for access

regulationSource.description: Normative or contractual source that defines this access class

effectiveFrom.description: ISO-8601 date when this access class becomes operative
